generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder mounted on the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor measuring shaft angle",
    producedData MotorEncoderStream
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder positioned behind the gearbox measuring output shaft angle",
    producedData GearboxEncoderStream
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hall‑effect sensor measuring motor phase current I_M",
    producedData MotorCurrentStream
]

instance TorqueVelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Derived torque and angular velocity measurement computed by the robot controller and streamed",
    producedData TorqueVelocityStream
]

instance AccelerationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Derived angular acceleration measurement streamed from the robot controller",
    producedData AccelerationStream
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance MotorEncoderStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance TorqueVelocityStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    producedFrom TorqueVelocitySensor
]

instance AccelerationStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    producedFrom AccelerationSensor
]

instance SimulatedReferenceStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
]

// C10: Data
instance MotorEncoderData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of motor shaft angle received via MQTT",
    fromData MotorEncoderStream,
    inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler
]

instance GearboxEncoderData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of gearbox output shaft angle received via MQTT",
    fromData GearboxEncoderStream,
    inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current I_M time‑series received via MQTT",
    fromData MotorCurrentStream,
    inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler
]

instance TorqueVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque and angular velocity stream derived from controller",
    fromData TorqueVelocityStream,
    inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular acceleration time‑series received via MQTT",
    fromData AccelerationStream,
    inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler
]

instance SimulatedReferenceOutputsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated reference outputs Ŕ_M, Ŕ_G, Ŕ_out (torque & velocity arrays) from Simulink models",
    fromData SimulatedReferenceStream,
    inputTo AssetAdministrationShellEnabler
]

instance IdentifiedFrictionParametersData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Continuously identified static, kinetic and viscous friction parameters derived from torque‑velocity stream",
    fromData TorqueVelocityData,
    inputTo AssetAdministrationShellEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker transporting live sensor streams to the digital twin",
    enables RealTimeDashboardVisualization,
    enables ContinuousFrictionIdentification,
    enables SimulationVsMeasuredComparison,
    enables FrictionParameterUpdateService
]

instance SysMLToolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool used to author block definition and internal block diagrams",
    enables RealTimeDashboardVisualization
]

instance SimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment executing motor, gearwheel, gearbox and friction models",
    enables ContinuousFrictionIdentification,
    enables SimulationVsMeasuredComparison
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell integrating engineering and simulation artifacts",
    enables FrictionParameterUpdateService,
    enables RealTimeDashboardVisualization
]

instance WebDashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web‑based front‑end rendering visualizations for operators and engineers",
    enables RealTimeDashboardVisualization
]

// C10: Models
instance MabiMaxVerticalAxisStructureBdd : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram describing motor‑gearbox structure of the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 robot",
    inputTo SysMLToolEnabler
]

instance MabiMaxVerticalAxisStructureIbd : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram detailing connections between motor, gearwheel and cycloidal gearbox",
    inputTo SysMLToolEnabler
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink executable model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor",
    inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearwheelModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the gearwheel within the gearbox",
    inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the cycloidal gearbox",
    inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SimulinkFrictionBaselineModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Friction‑less baseline Simulink model providing reference behavior",
    inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SimulinkFrictionCoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical Simulink model implementing Coulomb‑Viscous friction",
    inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SimulinkFrictionStribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical Simulink model implementing Stribeck friction",
    inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SimulinkFrictionDahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical Simulink model implementing Dahl friction",
    inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SimulinkFrictionLuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical Simulink model implementing LuGre friction",
    inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeDashboardVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Web‑based dashboard visualizing live sensor data and friction model status",
    provides InsightFrictionDynamics
]

instance ContinuousFrictionIdentification : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of static, kinetic and viscous friction parameters from streamed data",
    provides InsightFrictionDynamics
]

instance SimulationVsMeasuredComparison : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated versus measured torque and angular velocity traces",
    provides InsightSimulationAccuracy
]

instance FrictionParameterUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generation and transmission of updated friction model parameters to the robot controller",
    provides ActionAdjustControlAlgorithm
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance InsightFrictionDynamics : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Engineers gain insight into friction dynamics for maintenance decision making"
]

instance InsightSimulationAccuracy : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into discrepancy between simulated and measured performance of the axis"
]

instance ActionAdjustControlAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Feed back derived friction parameters to adjust the robot controller's motion control algorithms",
    IsAutomatic true
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous, real‑time operation where data is ingested and processed as soon as it is published by the robot (streaming via MQTT)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A digital shadow composed of a Processing component that consumes measured data traces, runs the Simulink simulation models (Simulation M, Simulation GW, Simulation GB) to generate simulated traces, and stores all traces with provenance metadata; the results are displayed in a unified dashboard."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operative stage – the digital shadow is created and used while the robot is running to monitor and improve its motion accuracy."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Full traceability of each DataPoint to its source and processing model; validation performed by comparing simulated friction‑free and friction‑included outputs with measured reference traces to assess model accuracy and identify friction parameters."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data are transmitted from the robot controller to the digital shadow over MQTT (publish/subscribe messaging)."
]
